description: A false-colour satellite image displays a heterogeneous landscape composed of forested areas and agricultural parcels. Dense vegetation, characteristic of forests, appears in deep red and magenta tones, dominating the central and left portions of the image. Surrounding these forested blocks and within them are numerous rectangular plots rendered in lighter red and pink hues, indicative of agricultural fields with varying stages of vegetation or bare soil. Patches of blue and cyan, likely representing non-vegetated surfaces such as bare soil or possibly man-made features, are visible, particularly in the upper right and scattered across the agricultural mosaic. White dashed lines are overlaid, delineating distinct parcels or boundaries within the landscape. No geographic location, scale, or date is provided.
